title: neillia thyrsiflora var. tunkinensis
intro: Neillia thyrsiflora var. tunkinensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, commonly known as the tunkin neillia or neillia. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
